name: Phillipine Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts into the crockpot.
2. Combine water, vinegar, and soy sauce in a bowl.
3. Add the garlic to the marinade.
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken breasts.
5. Cook for 6 to 8 hours on LOW heat.
6. Serve the chicken over rice.
Note: You may use one whole chicken if preferred, cutting it up first.
